locationUnitType.reference_hint: CoT type string stored in .pref (e.g. a-f-G-U-C). Choose Custom for other symbology types.

options.label: Ignore Internal GPS / Use External or Network GPS Only
External or Network GPS / Fallback Internal GPS

useTerrainElevationSelfMarker.item: Use Elevation Data instead of GPS Elevation

dispatchLocationCotExternalAtStart.item: Report Location before obtaining location fix

prepareForClone.item: Prepare for Cloning / Clear Device unique information

autoDisableMeshSAWhenStreaming.item: Auto Manage Mesh Network Self SA Mode

volumemapswitcher.item: Enable Volume Keys rotating map layers

max_num_bread_tracks.item: Set Max Number of Bread Crumbs

track_line_to_surface.item: Render bread crumb line to ground in 3-D

rab_dist_slant_range.item: Range and Bearing Line Distance Format

rab_preference_show_eta.item: Display ETA on Range and Bearing Labels

faux_nav_bar_reverse.item: Reverse the buttons on the Faux Navigation Bar

disable_autolink_mapitem_links.item: Disable AutoLink launching for Associated Links

offscreen_indicator_timeout_threshold.item: Set Timeout Threshold (seconds) or zero to disable

staleRemoteDisconnects.item: Stale out remote users as they disconnect from TAK Servers

expireEverything.item: Remove all marker types from map when they stale out

expireUnknowns.item: Remove Unknown markers when they stale out

atakLongPressMap.item: Action for Long Pressing the Map

options.label: Force General Radio and Wireless Off
